description: WP negative vectors for controlled validation/refusal behavior. These vectors do not execute implementation code or generate artifacts.

cases.invalid_condition: Commit staged tasks without required provenance_stamps.

expected_outcome.remediation: Provide preset/task_pool/profile/calendar/bundle provenance stamps before commit.

cases.invalid_condition: Apply plan without a valid plan_proposal_id.

expected_outcome.remediation: Generate or select a valid PROPOSED plan before apply.

cases.invalid_condition: Apply stale or non-PROPOSED plan proposal.

expected_outcome.remediation: Only a current PROPOSED plan may be applied through WP authority.

cases.invalid_condition: Stage a task with a task_type outside the WP/TP enum.

expected_outcome.remediation: Use one of the governed task_type enum values.

cases.invalid_condition: Dependency cycle exists in staged or committed task set.

expected_outcome.remediation: Remove the dependency cycle before commit or apply.
